howItWorks.title: Zero setup. Instant clarity.
howItWorks.subtitle: Most devs have no idea how they actually code with AI. DevPet changes that in 30 seconds.

steps.title: Open your editor. That's it.
steps.desc: Cursor, VS Code, Claude Code — DevPet detects your session automatically. No config, no plugins, no friction.

steps.title: See what you can't see alone
steps.desc: Prompt patterns, error loops, time sinks — DevPet turns your invisible habits into a clear narrative you can actually learn from.

meetYourPet.title: A coding companion that actually gets you.
meetYourPet.body: Your pet isn't decoration — it mirrors your real coding state. When you're in flow, it celebrates. When you're stuck in a loop, it notices before you do. The devs in our beta say it's the first tool that made coding with AI feel less lonely.
meetYourPet.growthNote: Your pet evolves as your skills grow — from curious kitten to seasoned mentor.
